blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,002 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
